title: Naaka Bandi
desc: Veera raises Raja, his foster sibling, after their parents are killed by Mangal. While Veera seeks to avenge his parents' murder, Raja's estranged uncle Kaalia arrives to instigate Raja against him.

title: Rishtey - A Grand Celebration
desc: After falling in love with each other, a man and a woman must overcome obstacles and the generation-long rift between their families.

title: Doodh Ka Karz
desc: When her snake charmer husband is falsely accused of theft and beaten to death, a widow raises her son to seek revenge, with the help of a loyal snake.

title: Aarzoo
desc: After her fiance, Vijay is killed in a crash, a pregnant Pooja agrees to marry Amar, her childhood friend. However, her life takes yet another turn when Vijay returns to her life.

title: Kasam Hindustan Ki
desc: Dhuruvan is a forest ranger who trains NCC cadets. On a trek with five college girls, he stumbles upon a gang of terrorists who plan to foil a rocket launch by ISRO.

title: Indian
desc: Police officer Raj Azad arrests terrorist Wasim Khan and prepares to interrogate him. However, his father-in-law mysteriously dies, after which he is blamed for his death and goes on the run.
